title: ESDC Reports and publications - Canada.ca
content:
## Reports and publications
- Corporate publications
- Related publications
- Proactive disclosure

## Corporate publications
Employment and Social Development Canada (ESDC) produces independent and objective research studies in support of its policy development work. It also produces several types of reports that act as on-going management tools to assist the department in improving the efficiency and effectiveness of its activities and to get better results.
- Access to Information and Privacy
- Departmental results reports
- Departmental procurement plans
- Interpretations, Policies and Guidelines (IPGs)
- Key Compliance Attributes of Internal Audit
- Quarterly financial reports
- Service Canada client experience survey
- State of Service report
- Survey results reports
- Sustainable Development Strategy

- Canada’s Volunteer Awards
- Collective bargaining
- Early learning and child care
- Employment Insurance
- Federal labour standards
- Federal Workers' Compensation Service
- Labour Market Information
- Public pensions (Canada Pension Plan and Old Age Security) Increasing Retirement Savings in Workplace Pension Plans through Simplified Enrolment: A Demonstration Project
- Increasing Retirement Savings in Workplace Pension Plans through Simplified Enrolment: A Demonstration Project
- Seniors and aging society
- Social Assistance Statistical Report: 2009-2013
- Social Insurance Number
- Student financial assistance
- Support for apprentices
- Sustainable Development Goals and 2030 Agenda
- Temporary Foreign Worker Program
- Workplace health and safety
- Compendium of best practices for a human-centered development and use of Artificial Intelligence in the world of work (December 2025)

- ESDC and Service Canada transition binders
